exort.message.only_player: Amarkan waxaa isticmaali kara ciyaaryahanno keliya.
exort.message.give_dropped: Inventory-ga %2$s wuu buuxay; %1$s shay baa agtiisa lagu tuuray.
exort.message.give_partial: Keliya %1$s ka mid ah %2$s shay ayaa loo abuuray %3$s.
exort.message.debug_player_click: Guji si aad u furto /exort debug storage %1$s
exort.message.debug_storage_invalid: UUID kayd ama magaca ciyaaryahan sax ma aha.
exort.message.debug_culling_unavailable: Adeegga display culling lama heli karo.
exort.message.usage_debug_player: tus kaydka hadda ama kii ugu dambeeyay ee ciyaaryahan
exort.message.usage_debug_storage: fur kayd id ama kaydkii ugu dambeeyay ee ciyaaryahan
exort.message.usage_debug_cache: baar cache kayd iyo xiriirada network ee raran
exort.message.usage_give_storage: sii shay kayd iyadoo tier ah
exort.message.usage_give_items: Walxo: storage_core, terminal, crafting_terminal, monitor, import_bus, export_bus, wire, wireless_terminal
exort.message.help_reload: dib u rar config iyo runtime
exort.message.debug_load_usage: Adeegsi: /exort debug benchmark start [players] [seconds] | /exort debug benchmark stop
exort.message.debug_load_running: Load test hore ayuu u socdaa.
exort.message.debug_load_started: Load test wuxuu u bilowday %1$s ciyaaryahan simulated.
exort.message.debug_load_verdict: Xukunka load test: %1$s (TPS min %2$s, max %3$s, avg %4$s, p1 %5$s; MSPT min %6$s, max %7$s, avg %8$s, p95 %9$s, p99 %10$s)
exort.message.debug_load_rare_stalls: Stalls dhif ah: %1$s sample ka hooseeya TPS 12, min %2$s.
exort.message.debug_load_summary: Qaabka benchmark: players %1$s, chunks %2$s, storages/chunk %3$s, buses/chunk %4$s, monitors/chunk %5$s, est ops/tick %6$s (global %7$s, chunk %8$s), db/tick %9$s, monitor updates %10$s/t%11$s, wire %12$s/%13$s miss %14$s%% cover %15$s%%, measured window %16$ss after setup (min warmup %17$ss), jitter %18$s%%, guard players %19$s, guard entities %20$s/%21$s, guard churn %22$s/tick, world lanes %23$s, world ops/tick %24$s, world blocks %25$s, water-test wire length %26$s, water sources %27$s, water extra chunks %28$s
exort.message.debug_load_measurement_sta: Cabbirka benchmark wuxuu bilaabmay ka dib setup iyo xasilinta water-flow.
exort.message.debug_load_hints: Talooyinka benchmark synthetic: dominant %1$s; CPU %2$s%%, WIRE %3$s%%, DISPLAYS %4$s%%, DB %5$s%%, WIRELESS %6$s%%, GUARDS %7$s%%, WORLD %8$s%% (placements %9$s).
exort.message.debug_load_mspt_verdict: Xukunka MSPT joogto ah: %1$s (avg %2$s, p95 %3$s, p99 %4$s).
exort.message.debug_load_metadata: Metadata benchmark: server %1$s, Exort %2$s, Java %3$s, plugins %4$s.
exort.message.debug_load_recent_runs: Benchmark dhawaan (%1$s): TPS avg %2$s, MSPT avg %3$s, MSPT p95 %4$s.
exort.message.debug_load_move_away: Ka dhaqaaq %1$s chunks kana fogow baloogyada Exort ama dami benchmark.simulateDisplays.
exort.message.debug_cache_started: Cache verbose logging waa la shiday (mode: %1$s, filter: %2$s).
exort.message.debug_cache_stopped: Cache verbose logging waa la damiyay.
exort.message.debug_cache_mode_invalid: Mode cache verbose lama yaqaan: %1$s. Isticmaal compact/normal/full.
exort.message.debug_worldedit_started: WorldEdit verbose logging waa la shiday (mode: %1$s).
exort.message.debug_worldedit_stopped: WorldEdit verbose logging waa la damiyay.
exort.message.debug_worldedit_mode_inval: Mode debug WorldEdit sax ma aha: %1$s. Isticmaal compact/normal/full.
exort.message.debug_pick_started: Pick verbose logging waa la shiday (mode: %1$s).
exort.message.debug_pick_stopped: Pick verbose logging waa la damiyay.
exort.message.debug_pick_mode_invalid: Mode pick verbose sax ma aha: %1$s. Isticmaal compact/normal/full.
exort.message.debug_culling_started: Display culling verbose logging waa la shiday (mode: %1$s).
exort.message.debug_culling_stopped: Display culling verbose logging waa la damiyay.
exort.message.debug_culling_mode_invalid: Mode display culling verbose sax ma aha: %1$s. Isticmaal compact/normal/full.
exort.message.debug_culling_client_inval: Ciyaaryahan lama yaqaan oo culling client bypass ah: %1$s.
exort.message.debug_culling_client_statu: Client culling bypass ee %1$s: manual=%2$s, auto=%3$s, source=%4$s, effective=%5$s, config=%6$s. Client probe: %7$s.
exort.message.debug_cache_status_evict: Evict: eligible=%1$s idleMs=%2$s/%3$s dirty=%4$s viewers=%5$s loading=%6$s
exort.message.debug_cache_status_marker_: Storage marker lagama helin chunks raran (chunk wuu unloaded noqon karaa).
exort.message.debug_cache_status_chunk: Chunk: loaded=%1$s level=%2$s forceLoaded=%3$s pluginTickets=%4$s players=%5$s
exort.message.debug_cache_status_connect: Nodes network raran: terminals=%1$s monitors=%2$s buses=%3$s total=%4$s
Ma jiraan terminals/monitors/buses raran oo ku xiran kaydkan.
exort.message.version: Exort Storage Network v%1$s waxaa sameeyay phantomfighterxx

exort.message.mode_set: Mode config waxaa loo dejiyay %1$s; mode effective: %2$s.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_missing: Lama shidi karo RESOURCE mode: file config Paper lagama helin %1$s.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_error: Lama shidi karo RESOURCE mode: akhriska ama cusboonaysiinta %1$s way fashilantay: %2$s. Gacanta ku dhig %3$s: true file-kan oo restart server.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_access_deni: Lama shidi karo RESOURCE mode: Exort ma qori karo %1$s. Hubi permissions file, ama dhig %2$s: true oo restart server.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_changed: Paper config waa la cusboonaysiiyay: %1$s waxaa laga dhigay true gudaha %2$s.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_restart_req: Paper config hore wuxuu leeyahay %1$s: true gudaha %2$s, balse Paper runtime hadda wali wuxuu u baahan yahay restart.
exort.message.mode_fix_exort_changed: Exort config waa la cusboonaysiiyay: mode waxaa loo dejiyay RESOURCE.
exort.message.mode_fix_restart_scheduled: Server restart wuxuu dhici doonaa 10 ilbiriqsi gudahood.
exort.message.mode_blocked: Lama shidi karo RESOURCE: Paper's block-updates.disable-chorus-plant-updates lama shidin.
exort.message.pack_rebuilt: Resource pack pipeline dib baa loo reload gareeyay.
exort.message.pack_sent: Codsiga resource pack waxaa loo diray %1$s.
exort.message.pack_sent_all: Codsiga resource pack waxaa loo diray %1$s ciyaaryahan.
exort.message.pack_status.provider_note: Resource-pack handoff waa u diyaar %1$s; provider ayaa ku dara marka startup/pack generation. Haddii %1$s hore loo shiday, restart ama reload provider-kaas gacanta.
exort.message.resource_pack.required_fai: Resource pack Exort ee qasabka ah wuu fashilmay. Dib u gal oo aqbal.
